system.notes: Signal amplifiers and noise filters that nullify enemy ECM (generally more available than ECM). Leveled 1–10; weight 12 kg (L1) up to 250 kg (L10); Base Time 16 hrs/level; Avail 4/7 days (L1) up to 18/1 year (L10). NOTE: the per-level Customization Cost column is garbled in the scan (L1 reads 110,000¥, inconsistent with L2 30,000¥) — costs flagged in NEEDS-CAPTURE pending a clean capture; the 10,000¥ here is a placeholder. Rigger 2 p.138.
